category_sources: source_facts.description says reckoner declaratively installs and manages multiple Helm chart releases; official docs call it a command line helper for Helm.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is reckoner; official repository is FairwindsOps/reckoner.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links to documentation at reckoner.docs.fairwinds.com.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names Helm chart release management; official docs describe declarative syntax for managing multiple releases.
